name: Asx Limited
analysis: ASX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$51.7900, stop A$47.3418, target A$57.1801 (1.21:1) — then trail it.
